summary: Completed comprehensive backend-only testing for endpoint-management features. All 61 tests passed successfully (100% success rate). Tested: Bulk Actions with batch tracking and per-device status, Device Groups CRUD with assignment operations, Maintenance Mode with alert suppression and bulk action skipping, Agent Installer endpoints (PowerShell/batch/ZIP), Enhanced Enrollment QR flow with deep-link and one-liners, Action retry functionality, and RBAC enforcement for destructive actions.
passed_tests: Admin login with admin@digitaltwin.com / ChangeMe!2026
GET /api/actions/kinds returns 19 action kinds with admin_only and requires_confirm sets
POST /api/actions/bulk creates batch with per-device actions
Bulk destructive action without confirm=true returns 400
GET /api/actions/batches lists batches with status_counts (pending, in_progress, succeeded, failed, cancelled, expired, total)
GET /api/actions/batches/{id} returns batch detail with actions array and device_hostname
POST /api/actions/{id}/retry rejects retry of active action (400)
POST /api/device-groups creates group (admin only) with device_count=0
GET /api/device-groups lists groups with device_count field
PATCH /api/device-groups/{id} updates group
POST /api/device-groups/{id}/assign adds devices to group
GET /api/device-groups/{id}/devices returns devices in group
POST /api/device-groups/{id}/unassign removes devices from group
DELETE /api/device-groups/{id} removes group and unassigns from all devices
Bulk action with group_ids resolves devices from group
POST /api/devices/{id}/maintenance/enable sets maintenance mode with ends_at and suppress_alerts
GET /api/devices/{id}/maintenance returns maintenance state
Bulk destructive action skips devices in maintenance mode (returns skipped list)
POST /api/devices/{id}/maintenance/disable clears maintenance mode
GET /api/installer/install.ps1 returns text/plain PowerShell script
PowerShell script with backend_url and code query params prepends $env: lines
GET /api/installer/install.bat returns text/plain batch wrapper
GET /api/installer/agent-bundle.zip returns application/zip with valid PK magic bytes
GET /api/installer/installer.info returns version + supported flags (requires auth)
GET /api/installer/enroll-link?code=XXX returns deep_link, one_liner_ps, one_liner_bat with correct formats
Technician gets 403 when trying to enqueue destructive bulk action (RBAC enforcement)
All diagnostic action kinds present: restart_agent, collect_event_logs, collect_diagnostic, collect_crash_dumps
